briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to perform DevIk certificate generation operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_OcpCertParams structure which holds the parameters of OCP input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASUFW is sent successfully.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASUFW.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to perform DevAk certificate generation operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_OcpCertParams structure which holds the parameters of OCP input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASUFW is sent successfully.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASUFW.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to perform CSR(Certificate Signing Request) generation operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_OcpCertParams structure which holds the parameters of OCP input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASUFW is sent successfully.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASUFW.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to perform DevAk attestation operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_OcpDevAkAttest structure which holds the parameters of OCP input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASUFW is sent successfully.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASUFW.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to generate UDE challenge response.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASUFW is sent successfully.

XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.

inbodydescription.para: Validate the Nonce buffer to be non-zero.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASUFW.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to perform UDE key encryption operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_OcpUdeKeyEncrypt structure which holds the parameters of UDE key arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASUFW is sent successfully.

XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASUFW.

briefdescription.para: This function sends an IPI request to get the Hardware Unique Key.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to XAsu_ClientParams which has parameters for the client request.
is a pointer to a buffer to hold the 256-bit Hardware Unique Key.
is the length of the buffer pointed to by HukBuf. It should not be less than XASU_OCP_HUK_SIZE_IN_BYTES (32 bytes).

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if the function finishes successfully.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if failed to get unique ID.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Send an IPI request to ASUFW.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the client interface functions for OCP driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 rmv 08/04/25 Initial release
